drl:
rule "R0"
salience -10
when
    T1($b0_0_0 : f0)
    T1(!(f0 <= -1000000007), $b0_1_0 : f0, $b0_1_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0($b1_0_0 : f1, $b1_0_1 : f1)
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    insert(new T1($p1_0.getF1(), "beta"));
    insert(new T1($b1_0_1, "a"));
end
rule "R2"
no-loop
agenda-group "gb"
when
    accumulate( T1(f1 in ("alpha", "a", "a")); $a2_0 : count() )
then
end
rule "R3"
salience -2
agenda-group "gb"
when
    (or (and T1($b3_0_0 : f0) T1(!(f0 <= -1000000007), $b3_1_0 : f0, $b3_1_1 : f0)) (and T1($b3_0_0 : f0) T1(f0 == 2.0, $b3_1_0 : f0, $b3_1_1 : f0, f1 contains "b")) (and T1($b3_0_0 : f0) T1(!(f0 <= -1000000007), $b3_1_0 : f0, $b3_1_1 : f0)))
then
end
rule "R4"
salience($b4_0_0 - $b4_1_0)
when
    T1($b4_0_0 : f0)
    T1(!(f0 <= -1000000007), $b4_1_0 : f0, $b4_1_1 : f0)
    exists(T1() and not(T1(f0 < -3)))
then
end
rule "R5"
when
    $p5_0 : T1(f0 < 2, $b5_0_0 : f0)
then
    delete($p5_0);
end
query Q0(String $qa0_0)
    $qp0_0 : T1(f1 == $qa0_0, f1 == $qa0_0)
end

query Q1(String $qa1_0)
    $qp1_0 : T1(f1 == $qa1_0, f1 == $qa1_0, f1 > "alpha")
    $qp1_1 : T1(f1 == $qa1_0)
end

query TCr(long $a, long $b)
    ( RelR($a, $b;) )
    or
    ( RelR($m, $b;) and TCr($a, $m;) )
end

rule QR0
when
    T1(f1 < "b")
    ?TCr(-1, -3;)
    ?Q0($qr0_x0;)
    T1(f1 == $qr0_x0)
then
    insert(new QOut(1, -1000000007, 6.0, $qr0_x0, false));
end

rule QR1
when
    T1()
    T0($qr1_b0 : f1)
    ?TCr(9, 12;)
then
    insert(new QOut(2, $qr1_b0, -0.5, "alpha", false));
end

rule QR2 salience 0
when
    T0(f0 == true)
    ?Q1("ab";)
then
    insert(new QOut(3, 8, 5.5, "ab", true));
end
